compressed_context:
H2: EU-ETS ALLOCATION-ISSUES  
PERIOD: PHASE I(2005–2007) ∧ PHASE II(2008–2012)  
NAPs: MEMBER-STATES DRAW EMISSION-INVENTORY ∧ ALLOCATION-METHODOLOGY ∵ PROTECT COMPETITIVENESS  
OUTCOME: OVERALLOCATION (HOT-AIR) ∧ CARBON-PRICE ↓  
DRIVERS: ECONOMIC-RECESSION ∧ OFFSET-CREDITS SUPPLY ↑ ⇒ PRICE-SUPPRESSION  
BENCHMARK-REVIEWS: PERIODIC PER TECH-PROGRESS [EU-DIR:2003/87]  
ISSUES: LACK-TRANSPARENCY ∧ ARBITRARY STATE-ADJUSTMENTS  
LEGAL: COMMISSION-V-POLAND ∧ CASES{C-217/06; C-389/10; C-505/11}
